name: System Admin
description: Has full access to the system Facility Manager side.

name: Landlord Admin
description: Has full access to landlords portal.

name: Vendor Admin
description: Has full access to vendors portal.

name: Vendor Technician
description: Has full access to vendors portal.

name: User
description: Can raise tickets and see information that concern them.

name: Caretaker
description: Handle day to day on the facilities

name: Procurement Manager
description: Approve all Procurement Requests and Select bids

name: Finance Manager
description: Handle Facility Finance issues and approve selected bids and co-sign on LPOs.
